text.description: Compilation and diagnostics for PAWN files, including #include checking and pawncc integration. Settings managed via .pawnpro/config.json.
config.includePaths:
Pawn compiler include directories. Use `${workspaceFolder}` for project-relative paths. Example: `["${workspaceFolder}/pawno/include"]`.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json` (takes precedence over this option).
config.compiler.path:
Path to the `pawncc` executable. If empty and `autoDetect` is enabled, the extension will try to detect it automatically.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.compiler.args:
Extra arguments passed to the compiler. Example: `["-d3", "-;+"]`.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.compiler.autoDetect:
When **enabled**, the extension searches for `pawncc` automatically in standard locations (PATH, `qawno/`, `pawno/`, `tools/`, etc.) if no path is set in `compiler.path`.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.output.encoding:
Character encoding used to decode compiler output. Use `windows1252` for standard SA-MP/open.mp compilers.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.build.showCommand:
When **enabled**, displays the full compiler command (with all arguments) in the output panel before compiling.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.syntax.scheme:
Color scheme for Pawn syntax. Use `auto` to detect automatically based on the editor theme.

> When applying a scheme via the `PawnPro: Apply syntax scheme` command, this option is set automatically.
config.syntax.scheme.auto: Auto-detect: uses dark scheme for dark themes, light for light themes
config.syntax.scheme.none: No scheme — uses editor default colors
config.syntax.applyOnStartup:
When **enabled**, the scheme configured in `syntax.scheme` is applied automatically when the editor starts.

> Set automatically when applying a scheme via command.
config.ui.showIncludePaths:
When **enabled**, shows the resolved include paths in the PawnPro Includes view.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.server.path:
Path to the server executable (`samp03svr`, `omp-server`, etc.). Leave empty for auto-detection at workspace root.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.server.cwd:
Working directory for the server. Use `${workspaceFolder}` for the project root.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.server.args:
Extra arguments passed to the server executable.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.server.clearOnStart:
When **enabled**, clears the server terminal on start.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.server.logPath:
Path to the server log file. Leave empty to use the server default (`server_log.txt` for SA-MP, or the file set in `logging.file` for open.mp).

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.server.logEncoding:
Character encoding of the server log file.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.server.output.follow:
Auto-scroll behavior for the server log. `visible` scrolls only when the panel is already visible. `always` scrolls and brings the panel into focus. `off` never scrolls.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.server.output.follow.visible: Auto-scroll only when the log panel is already visible
config.server.output.follow.always: Always scroll and bring the panel into focus
config.analysis.warnUnusedInInc:
When **enabled**, emits unused symbol warnings also in include files.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.analysis.suppressDiagnosticsInInc:
When **enabled**, include files show no errors or warnings.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json`.
config.analysis.sdk.platform:
SDK platform used in the project. `omp` auto-detects `qawno/include/open.mp.inc` at the workspace root. `samp` has no auto-detection — set the path manually via `analysis.sdk.filePath`. `none` disables SDK support.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json` as `analysis.sdk.platform`.
config.analysis.sdk.platform.omp: open.mp — auto-detects qawno/include/open.mp.inc at the workspace root
config.analysis.sdk.platform.samp: SA-MP — no auto-detection, set the path in analysis.sdk.filePath
config.analysis.sdk.platform.none: Disabled — no SDK file will be loaded
config.analysis.sdk.filePath:
Absolute path (or with `${workspaceFolder}`) to the centralizing `.inc` file for the SDK. For open.mp, leave empty to use auto-detection. For SA-MP, point to the file that centralizes all SDK includes.

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json` as `analysis.sdk.filePath`.
config.server.type:
Server type. Select `samp` for SA-MP, `omp` for open.mp, or `auto` to detect automatically from the config file present (`server.cfg` or `config.json`).

> Can also be configured in `.pawnpro/config.json` as `server.type`.
config.server.type.auto: Auto-detect from file present (config.json → open.mp, server.cfg → SA-MP)
config.server.type.omp: open.mp — uses config.json and the log file set in logging.file
